poi.info:
[- ARE YOU LEVEL 70+? -]
• I Am Level 70+! If you have reached level 70 you can continue onto finish Volume 4 of this speed leveling guide and continue following the path strait!
• I Am NOT Level 70+! If you are not level 70 yet, please veer right and continue leveling by continueing onto Smokestead Waypoint and knocking out another achievement in Volume 4.

[- USE MYSTIC FORGE -]
Combine the 4 items of the same quality you set aside previously in the [Mystic Forge]

[- TRANSMUTE -]
Open your hero panel (H) then click on equipment > wardrobe. Click on any piece of gear & transmute it to look different.
[- NOTE -] Make sure you hit the [Apply] Button thats on the right side of this panel.

[- JOIN WvW -]
Open Your WvW Panel (B) Then Click On One Of The Zone Options That Doesnt Have A Queue.
[- NOTE -] Once You Have Entered WvW You Can Open Your WvW Panel (B) Again And Click The Icon Next To [Leave the Mists] On The Bottom Right Of The WvW Panel To Be Returned Here And Continue.

[- CRAFTING (30-150) -]
Depending on where your crafting levels are refine materials/combine luck until it turns gray (receiving zero xp from craft).
[- CRAFTING LEVEL 30-150 -] this is the last stretch of crafting we need to do. The gw2crafts.net link for artificing has been copied. Paste it into your browser and do what you need to in order to hit 150 crafting.
with this site you can put in a gw2 api key and get exact details on what to craft, or, you can do your own thing. Hit crafting level 150 and then continue.
[- NOTE -] if you level/have leveled handiworker crafting it is account wide and you dont need to worry about leveling crafting.
[- IMPORTANT NOTE -] be sure to craft 4 actual items of the same rarity while you are here. You will need them for the mystic forge in the step that follows.

[- PURCHASE UPGRADES / RESTOCK -]
Welcome to the half-way point in the run. Depending on what boosters/buffs you have you may be just a bit over leveled or WAY over leveled but either way you probably feel a bit squishy. So take this time to fix that.
*** DO NOT SKIP DOING UPGRADES! ***
[- FOOD / UTILITY -] • Bowl of Candy Corn Custard • Quality Sharpening Stone
[- ARMOR / WEAPON UPGRADES -] This process will always be the same • Click the cog icon • Make the level range -5/+1 current level • Click the first dropdown and select power • Click the fifth dropdown and select fine/masterwork • Sort by price and buy +What is cheapest +What is closest in level • Click through each category and repeat
[- OPTIONAL ITEMS -] • (4) Rune of Vampirism • (2) Rune of the Warrior • (2) Sigil of Blood • (2) Sigil of Fire

[- PURCHASE UPGRADES / RESTOCK -]
Welcome to the half-way point in the run. Depending on what boosters/buffs you have you may be just a bit overleveled or way overleveled but either way you probably feel a bit squishy. So take this time to fix that.
*** DO NOT SKIP DOING UPGRADES! ***
[- FOOD / UTILITY -] • Bowl of Candy Corn Custard • Artisan Tuning Crystal
[- ARMOR / WEAPON UPGRADES -] This process will always be the same • Click the cog icon • Make the level range -5/+1 current level • Click the first dropdown and select condition • Click the fifth dropdown and select fine/masterwork • Sort by price and buy +What is cheapest +What is closest in level • Click through each category and repeat
[- OPTIONAL ITEMS -] • (4) Rune of Scavenging • (2) Rune of the Necromancer • (2) Sigil of Blood • (2) Sigil of Fire

[- USE BANK -]
Take this time to use the bank if you need to.

[- VOLUME 4 FINISHED -]
Your [Adventure Guide: Volume Four] Should Now Be Finished. If Its Not, Go To The Achievement And Finish It Up, Then Return Here To Continue.

[- STARTING VOLUME 5 -]
Starting [Adventure Guide: Volume Five] Now. Follow The --PURPLE-- Trail.

[- SPECIAL INSTRUCTION -]
If you came into Lion's Arch here thats fine, it simply means you have already entered Lion's Arch on this toon previously. Mount up and run to the [Volume 4] marker on the map to continue correctly.

[- SPECIAL INSTRUCTION -]
If you came back into Lion's Arch here thats fine, it simply means you left WvW through a portal. Mount up and run to the [Volume 4] marker on the map and continue past the WvW marker onto the crafting stations.

poi.tip-description: Lion's Arch speed leveling route starts here!
